title: Entertainment News Today LIVE Updates on May 31, 2026: Emily Blunt says she didn't use AI in Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day: ‘I’m terrified of it'
description: Entertainment News Today Live Updates on May 31, 2026: Stay updated with the latest entertainment news, OTT releases, movie releases, box office collection, celebrity buzz & global trends. Check Real-time coverage with Mint's live blog.

title: Emily Blunt says she didn't use AI in Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day: ‘I’m terrified of it'
description: Emily Blunt has revealed she rejected the use of artificial intelligence for a crucial scene in Steven Spielberg’s upcoming sci-fi film Disclosure Day, opting instead to create the sounds herself.

title: Dell Stock Soars to All-Time High After AI Server Revenue Jumps Sharply
description: Dell stock hits a new all-time high as strong AI server sales, higher revenue guidance, and rising data center demand drive investor confidence.

title: Hollywood's resistance to AI risks putting US creatives at a global disadvantage
description: U.S. studios and artists are resisting AI while India, South Korea, and Norway adopt it at scale. Panelists at this week's AI on the Lot conference warned American creatives risk falling behind globally.

title: AFT calls for screen limits and AI restrictions in elementary schools
description: The American Federation of Teachers wants screens banned in pre-K through 2nd grade and student-facing AI removed from all elementary schools. The 10-point plan from AFT president Randi Weingarten calls for clearer guardrails, not an outright AI ban.
